Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client (either individual or corporate) of the legal firm, storing their complete registration information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Client entity.

name.description: The client's full name or corporate name.

documentNumber.description: The client's CPF (individual) or CNPJ (corporate) identification number.

city.description: The city where the client resides.

state.description: The state where the client resides.

birthDateOrFoundationDate.description: The client's date of birth (for individuals) or company foundation date (for corporate clients).

type.description: The type of client, e.g., 'individual' or 'corporate'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the client record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the client record was last updated.

StaffProfile.title: StaffProfile
StaffProfile.description: Represents a legal team member with their profile information and access roles.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StaffProfile entity, typically linked to Firebase Authentication user ID.

googleId.description: The Google User ID used for API impersonation and real-time notifications via Google Workspace integrations.

email.description: The staff member's email address, used for login and contact.

role.description: The role of the staff member, defining their access permissions (e.g., 'admin', 'lawyer', 'financial', 'assistant').

isActive.description: Indicates whether the staff member's account is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the staff profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the staff profile was last updated.

Process.title: Process
Process.description: Details of a legal process, including its current status, associated client, and key legal information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Process entity.

clientId.description: Reference to the Client associated with this process. (Relationship: Client 1:N Process)

caseType.description: The specific area of law for the case (e.g., 'Trabalhista', 'Cível').

status.description: The current status of the process, reflecting its position in the workflow (e.g., 'Distribuição', 'Em Andamento', 'Arquivado').

description.description: A brief description or summary of the legal case.

court.description: The court where the case is being processed.

vara.description: The specific court division or chamber handling the case.

responsibleStaffId.description: Reference to the StaffProfile responsible for this process. (Relationship: StaffProfile 1:N Process)

startDate.description: The official date when the process commenced.

lastUpdateDate.description: The date of the last significant event or update in the process.

driveFolderId.description: The Google Drive folder ID where all documents related to this process are stored.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the process record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the process record was last updated.

Defendant.title: Defendant
Defendant.description: Represents a defendant (reclamada) involved in a legal process.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Defendant entity.

processId.description: Reference to the Process this defendant is associated with. (Relationship: Process 1:N Defendant)

name.description: The defendant's full name or corporate name.

documentNumber.description: The defendant's CPF (individual) or CNPJ (corporate) identification number, if applicable.

city.description: The city where the defendant is located.

state.description: The state where the defendant is located.

notes.description: Any specific notes or relevant information about the defendant.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the defendant record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the defendant record was last updated.

Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Represents a potential client undergoing the initial CRM triaging process.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Lead entity.

status.description: The current Kanban status of the lead (e.g., 'NOVO', 'ATENDIMENTO', 'CONTRATUAL', 'BUROCRACIA', 'DISTRIBUIÇÃO').

notes.description: Free-form notes from initial contact with the lead.

legalArea.description: The intended legal area of interest for the lead (e.g., 'Trabalhista', 'Cível').

triagemQuestionnaireResponses.description: An array of objects storing dynamic questionnaire responses from the triaging process. Each object represents a question/answer pair or a structured response.

assignedStaffId.description: Reference to the StaffProfile assigned to manage this lead. (Relationship: StaffProfile 1:N Lead)

convertedToProcessId.description: Reference to the Process entity if this lead has been successfully converted into an active process. (Relationship: Lead 1:1 Process, optional)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the lead record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the lead record was last updated.

Hearing.title: Hearing
Hearing.description: Details of a scheduled legal hearing or client appointment, integrated with Google Calendar.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Hearing entity.

processId.description: Reference to the Process related to this hearing. (Relationship: Process 1:N Hearing)

staffId.description: Reference to the StaffProfile participating in this hearing. (Relationship: StaffProfile 1:N Hearing)

title.description: The title of the event (e.g., 'Audiência Trabalhista', 'Atendimento ao Cliente').

description.description: A detailed description of the hearing or appointment.

startDateTime.description: The scheduled start date and time of the hearing.

endDateTime.description: The scheduled end date and time of the hearing.

location.description: The physical address or virtual meeting link for the hearing.

googleCalendarEventId.description: The unique ID of the corresponding event in Google Calendar for bidirectional synchronization.

notificationSent.description: Indicates whether a WhatsApp notification for this hearing has been sent.

postActStatus.description: The status after the event, used for follow-ups (e.g., 'Acordo', 'Pendente', 'Reagendado').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the hearing record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the hearing record was last updated.

Deadline.title: Deadline
Deadline.description: Tracks judicial deadlines, including automated calculation and AI-parsed information from official publications.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Deadline entity.

processId.description: Reference to the Process to which this deadline belongs. (Relationship: Process 1:N Deadline)

staffId.description: Reference to the StaffProfile responsible for this deadline. (Relationship: StaffProfile 1:N Deadline)

title.description: A brief description of the deadline (e.g., 'Contestação', 'Recurso Ordinário').

description.description: A more detailed explanation of the deadline and required action.

dueDate.description: The calculated official due date for the deadline.

calculationType.description: The method used for calculating the due date (e.g., 'Dias Úteis (CPC)', 'Dias Corridos').

publicationDate.description: The date of the official publication in the DJE (Diário da Justiça Eletrônico).

publicationText.description: The raw text content from the DJE publication related to this deadline.

extractedDueDate.description: The due date automatically extracted by the AI parser from the publication text (for verification).

extractedDeadlineType.description: The type of deadline automatically extracted by the AI parser.

googleTaskId.description: The unique ID of the corresponding task in Google Tasks for staff management.

status.description: The current status of the deadline (e.g., 'Aberto', 'Concluído', 'Vencido').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the deadline record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the deadline record was last updated.

FinancialTitle.title: FinancialTitle
FinancialTitle.description: Records financial movements, including honorariums, costs, and repasses, related to legal cases and clients.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FinancialTitle entity.

processId.description: Reference to the Process associated with this financial entry, if applicable. (Relationship: Process 0:1 FinancialTitle)

clientId.description: Reference to the Client associated with this financial entry. (Relationship: Client 1:N FinancialTitle)

description.description: A description of what the financial entry is for (e.g., 'Honorários iniciais', 'Custas processuais').

type.description: The type of financial transaction (e.g., 'Honorário', 'Custo Processual', 'Repasse', 'Reembolso').

value.description: The monetary amount of the financial entry.

dueDate.description: The date when the payment is expected or due.

paymentDate.description: The date when the payment was actually received or made.

status.description: The current status of the financial title (e.g., 'Pendente', 'Recebido', 'Vencido', 'Estornado').

receiptGenerated.description: Indicates whether a professional receipt for this entry has been generated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the financial title record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the financial title record was last updated.

StaffCredit.title: StaffCredit
StaffCredit.description: Manages the credit system for legal staff, tracking retained and available honorarium shares and payouts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StaffCredit entity.

staffId.description: Reference to the StaffProfile to whom this credit belongs. (Relationship: StaffProfile 1:N StaffCredit)

financialTitleId.description: Reference to the FinancialTitle from which this credit originated. (Relationship: FinancialTitle 1:N StaffCredit)

description.description: A description of the credit entry (e.g., 'Share of Honorarium for Process XXX').

amount.description: The monetary amount of the credit.

status.description: The current status of the credit (e.g., 'Retido', 'Disponível', 'Pago').

releaseDate.description: The date when the credit became available for payout to the staff member, typically after client payment confirmation.

paymentDate.description: The date when the credit was paid out to the staff member.

honorariumPercentage.description: The percentage of the honorarium applied to calculate this credit (e.g., 30%).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the staff credit record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the staff credit record was last updated.

Checklist.title: Checklist
Checklist.description: Represents a strategic or operational checklist template for firm standardization.

definition.description: Stores individual staff member profiles and their assigned roles.
Maintains comprehensive registration data for legal clients.
Contains details for each legal process.
Registers defendants associated with legal processes.
Manages potential client leads through a Kanban workflow.
Schedules and tracks legal hearings and appointments.
Manages individual staff member's honorarium credits.
Stores firm standardization protocols and compliance checklists.
